name: urban_planning_ransomware_incident_northpine_tru_loy
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Urban Planning, the situation tagged internally around urban planning ransomware incident northpine tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Fatima Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Fatima Alvarez, the accountable executive on this bridge in Urban Planning. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Arjun Nielsen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Urban Planning. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Fatima Alvarez must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Fatima Alvarez do?
